label: sandbox • produce a file in the VM and deliver it via share_artifact
query: Create report.csv in your sandbox home with a header row 'month,revenue' and five rows of plausible sample monthly revenue data. Then deliver it to me with share_artifact, including a one-line description — I cannot see files inside your sandbox, so sharing the artifact is the only way I can receive it. Call complete when you are done.
notes: Artifact delivery is mandatory from the sandbox (the user has no view into the VM): the file must exist in the home AND a qualifying share_artifact call with a description must land before complete.
